channel.title: Python on NullByte Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Python on NullByte Notes

item.title: CDR Forensic Analysis
item.description:
A desktop application for law enforcement that automates forensic analysis of Call Detail Records from Indian telecom providers

Table of Contents

  1. Project Overview
  2. The Problem It Solves
  3. Key Features
  4. Technology Stack
  5. Architecture
  6. Investigation Modules
  7. Real-World Use Cases
  8. Interview Q&A

Project Overview

The CDR Forensic Analysis Tool is a desktop application designed for law enforcement agencies, cybercrime investigators, and digital forensic professionals. It automates the analysis of Call Detail Records (CDRs) obtained from Indian telecom service providers.

item.title: IntelRecon-OSINT-Automation-Tool
item.description:
A modular, menu-driven OSINT framework that automates intelligence gathering from publicly available sources while maintaining strict legal and ethical standards

Table of Contents

  1. Project Overview
  2. The Problem It Solves
  3. Investigation Modules
  4. Architecture
  5. Technology Stack
  6. API Integration
  7. Safety & Legal Compliance
  8. Output Format
  9. Interview Q&A

Project Overview

OSINT = Open Source Intelligence — gathering information from publicly available sources.

The OSINT Investigation Framework is a command-line tool that automates intelligence gathering about:

item.title: NovaEmail - Secure Email Platform
item.description:
A self-hosted, full-featured email platform with React frontend, Express backend, custom SMTP server, and real-time notifications

Table of Contents

  1. Project Overview
  2. The Problem It Solves
  3. Key Features
  4. Architecture
  5. Technology Stack
  6. System Components
  7. Email Flow
  8. Deployment
  9. Security Implementation
  10. Interview Q&A

Project Overview

NovaEmail is a complete, self-hosted email platform you can deploy on your own server. Instead of relying on Gmail or Outlook, you host a full-featured email system with your own domain.
